objective: Add actionable controls to read-only pages missing operator interactions
background: 2 pages appear to display data without any interactive controls (no buttons, links, or forms). Operators cannot act on what they see.
constraints: Do not add controls that trigger irreversible actions without confirmation
Do not remove read-only data display
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Each identified page reviewed for intended audience and purpose
At least one actionable control added per page (refresh, export CSV, view detail, or clear filter)
required_outputs: Each identified page reviewed for intended audience and purpose
At least one actionable control added per page (refresh, export CSV, view detail, or clear filter)
forbidden_changes: Do not add controls that trigger irreversible actions without confirmation
Do not remove read-only data display
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
